description: Letter of condolence in Judaeo-Arabic and Hebrew to a certain Abū l-Ḥasan al-Mubārak b. [ʿIyad?]. On the death of a woman in his family (אלאשה אלכשירה). Transitions into Arabic script in the second line of the margin.Verso preserves the address of the letter and several later columns of accounts in Arabic script.
description_he: מכתב בArabic, Hebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
